<?php namespace PayPalCheckoutSdk\Core; use PayPalHttp\Injector; class FPTIInstrumentationInjector implements Injector { public function inject($request) { $request->headers["sdk_name"] = "Checkout SDK"; $request->headers["sdk_version"] = "1.0.2"; $request->headers["sdk_tech_stack"] = "PHP " . PHP_VERSION; $request->headers["api_integration_type"] = "PAYPALSDK"; } }
